scripts.build:cross: bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile=dist/bytesail-linux-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile=dist/bytesail-linux-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile=dist/bytesail-darwin-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile=dist/bytesail-darwin-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-windows-x64 --outfile=dist/bytesail-windows-x64.exe
